transcript.text:
There's something I always eat when I come to an island
[For today...]
[It's Chinese cuisine]
[Have you ever heard of...]
[Chinese Bibimbap (mixed rice)]
[Prepare the vegetables]
[Fire performance]
[Abalone Seafood Jjamppong (spicy noodles)]
[Seafood Udon]
[Seafood Jjajang Platter (black bean noodles)]
[Shrimp Tangsuyuk (fried shrimp)]
[Order up]
[There's no way]
[smh]
First time seeing anything like that in 55 years here in Ulleung Island
I've never seen anyone eat that much

What in the world...
[Must get it on film]
[1 night in Ulleungdo Village]
It's dinner time right now I'll go catch an octopus
Here's the trap
I have to buy some bait
Excuse me
[Looking for me?] Yes?
Can I get some pork fat?
We don't have that
I need an octopus bait
[Let's see]
This is beef fat
Go catch with these
Thank you
[Where are you headed?]

You have to tie the strings
Make sure it's all tied up
Will I catch 1 if I do that?
No, the octopus needs to walk inside
[Buying some chicken as well]
You'll catch maybe 2-3
[Some fish too]
Beef, chicken, fish I'll put all of them in
It's cold!
I caught 1 at Yokji Island before
[Ready]
I think I can catch like 10 because the trap is so big
Beef fat,
Fish, and chicken
[Setting up the bait]
[She's very serious at what she does]

I'll catch them all
I can see through the water
What? Isn't that an octopus?
[Just seaweed]
[Experienced]
It's perfect
[Another one]
I'm going to eat octopus jjamppong and octopus tangsuyuk tomorrow!
[Next morning at 6:00AM]
It's 6 in the morning
I've come out to check the traps
There's gotta be some
[Well..?]
[Fail]
Well, this one is pretty shallow
[How about the 2nd trap?]

[Did she catch 1?]
[Nope]
Nothing in here
Nothing!
[Caught some conch though]
You've caught something!
Fish!
I've caught 1!
Let's release it
[Releasing it back]
I thought I could catch 1, but I've failed
Let's go eat Jjajangmyun (black bean noodles)
[A clear day in Ulleung Island]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Dodong Pier here at Ulleungdo
Over there

That's the pier
It's more like a downtown
It's such a beautiful day Beautiful waters, right?
There's something I always eat when I come to an island
Chinese cuisine!
Ulleung Island
I've going to go to 1 that's recommended
Hi squid!
So many squids
There are squids everywhere here in Ulleung Island
Squid
Is it here?
[Gyeongsangbuk-do, Ulleung-gun] [Dokdo Banjeom]
This is a storage
Over there
Dokdo Jjamppong House

Hello
[What is it?]
Hi It's a puppy
So cute
He likes females especially
Momo~
[Yes?]
[Running to nuna]
Menu!
So many items
Ulleung Jjamppong?
Is there something you want in particular? Or do you want recommendations?
What's good here?
Abalone Seafood Jjamppong
Jjajang Noodles
Then...

From that menu over there
Abalone Seafood Jjamppong, Abalone Seafood Udon,
Seafood Jjajang Plate, the 2-serving one
Shrimp Tangsuyuk (fried shrimp with sweet & sour sauce)
And also the Chinese bibimbap
You're going to eat all of that?
It doesn't matter for me, but Give me a sec
[Brings paper]
[I'm ready]
[Orders again]
I'd have to stage the ambulance there
I'll be fine
[Let's get cooking]
[Frying the shrimp]
[Give it that smoky flavor]
[Over rice]

[Fried egg]
[Chinese bibimbap]
You look so frail
We have a regular that eats 2 large bowls and I say he's not human
-I've made a bet -A bet?
If you'll finish or not
-Which did you bet on? -I said you can't finish it
He wanted to make a bet
For 10,000 Won (~$8.50 USD)
[Make the noodles]
[Wash with cold water]
[Stir-fry the vegetables]
[Get that smokiness in]
[Boil boil]
[Abalone Seafood Jjamppong (spicy noodles)]
[Abalone Seafood Udon]

[Seafood Jjajang Noodles (black bean noodles)]
[Shrimp Tangsuyuk (fried shrimp with sweet & sour sauce)]
Wow, that looks delicious
I can't help but laugh
[That's a lot of food]
Let me see it with my own eyes
[Forreal?]
Looks good Bon appetit
Seafood jjajang first
Cut them up
That looks so good
[A live concert scene]
1 bite is almost a bowl
It has a kick to it
Both the noodles and the sauce are fantastic
[Noodle slurp]

I'm being careful not to get my shirt dirty
That's a lot of food
It's really good
I can taste the smoky flavor
A lot of seafood too
Let's try the jjamppong next
Squid in here too It looks great
It looks very similar to the one I had at Yokji Island
This seems a little bigger
Looks good
Mussel and squid all from here in Ulleungdo
This is the Ulleung squid?
It's going to be very tender
Some soup first
It's very deep
Just a sec, Food critiques are always difficult

-Clean? -Yes, it's very clean
The soup itself is very savory
But it's not too strong
Very clean and refreshing
Put a squid on top
Ulleungdo squid
[More audience]
I've had plenty of other shrimp dishes, but never Shrimp Tangsuyuk
Tangsuyuk is generally a crunchy dish, But this one is very soft
I love this dish
[Udon next!]
Ulleungdo mussel
It's very big
It's really good
It's chewy
And tender

I don't like mussels that much,
But these are big and tasty
It's very flavorful and clean
Wait, I suck at this
It's good!
As long as it's tasty
[It's so good that she stopped talking]
Shrimp Tangsuyuk
Even the tail tastes good
This is the Bibimbap (rice with vegetables)
I've always wanted to try this
I've never had it It looks very unique
This is famous here in the South
Look at the visuals Amazing
What is this? Looks so good
Break up the yolk

Get it together
This is really...
This can't go wrong
That smokiness is insane
This is incredible It's so good
It tastes just like how it looks
It's really yummy
This is just what I like
Every island has their own specialties
So it's fun to eat at Chinese cuisines
I always try to go to 1 when I visit an island
[The slurping noise continues]
How many shrimps are in here?
So many seafoods in here
They give you a lot of seafood
Big chunks of squid and mussels

Mussels are chewy and tasty
Look at that size
First time seeing anything like that in 55 years here in Ulleung Island
You're a baby though
[Not a baby stomach hehe]
This is a medium size
More shrimp than Large platters at other places
I had a lot, but (counting)
It's good
I finished the noodles
This is all seafood
I highly recommend the Chinese Bibimbap when you go to a Chinese cuisine in Gyeongsang province
That smoky flavor
[Shrimp]
Worried she'll get indigestion Should I give her some plum extract?
I've never seen anyone eat that much

Even 5 grown men would struggle with that
Abalone!
[1 big bite]
[With some soup]
Bibimbap is stronger than the soup
I feel healed when I come to an island
Wake up to an ocean view
Everyone has dreamed of it some time in their lives
I've been wanting to go fishing, but the weather has not been on my side
I heard they catch Yellowtails this big
I want to catch 1
The waters are so clear that you can see the bottom
I want to go scuba diving too
[Finishing up the bibimbap]
[Hear me out]
That jjajang plate is 2 servings

Abalone seafood jjamppong, Abalone seafood udon,
Medium-size shrimp tangsuyuk
She eats this much
I don't believe it
[The best]
I'll eat the sauce too
The sauce itself is amazing
The soup is very refreshing
Last one!
Is she done?
What in the world...
Thanks everyone!
[Extra scenes]
What even is this?
My goodness
Didn't you make a bet?

Good thing it was only for 10,000 Won
Such an incredible appetite
I really didn't think you'd be able to do it
Here you go A bet is a bet
I've lost 10,000 Won!
